query: SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = '-philips-fc-8632'; SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, AVG(rating) as avg_rating FROM reviews WHERE productId = (SELECT id FROM products WHERE slug = '-philips-fc-8632') AND status = 'approved';
